stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
An aircraft flies overhead the MOU VOR/DME with an ETO of 18:01 and an ATO of 17:59. A diversion around a CB cloud increases the ATO overhead MOKIP by 3 minutes more than the ETO. The pilot decides to update the ETO times after MOKIP. Assuming that there is not any additional delay, what will the updated ETO be overhead KOGAS FIR boundary?
